goal: is_injective_fn[M, N](f) = forall(x0: M, x1: M) { f(x0) = f(x1) implies x0 = x1 }
proof: function[T0, T1](x0: T0 -> T1) { forall(x1: T0, x2: T0) { x0(x2) != x0(x1) or x2 = x1 } = is_injective_fn[T0, T1](x0) }[M, N](f)

goal: is_trivial_linear_map_kernel[R, M, N](src, dst, f) = forall(x0: M) { f(x0) = N.0 implies x0 = M.0 }
proof: function[T0: AddCommGroup, T1: AddCommGroup, T3: Ring](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: Module[T3, T0], x2: Module[T3, T1]) { forall(x3: T0) { x0(x3) != T1.0 or T0.0 = x3 } = is_trivial_linear_map_kernel[T3, T0, T1](x1, x2, x0) }[M, N, R](f, src, dst)
